creator: lazeraman@gmail.com
text:
The short answer is the FreeBSD 14.1 source does not include changes to support RAID-Z expansion (see commit https://github.com/freebsd/freebsd-src/commit/5caeef02fa531238b4554afc977533382e43314).

It appears that it is supported in the main branch for FreeBSD (15.0-CURRENT). This port uses "/usr/src" files to build, which needs to be updated to add this feature.

Not sure how this gets fixed if it needs to be merged into the src...
